title: Ishtakamya
desc: Doctor Aakarsh, who is separated from his wife, Adithi, falls in love with another girl, Acchari. He is caught in a fix when his estranged wife comes back.

title: Silli Lalli

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati fall in love at the start of the universe. Their eternal love story becomes a legendary tale of devotion for future generations.

desc: Anika, a young woman, gets rejected by every possible marriage prospect for being overweight. However, things take a turn when she meets Abhay, a fitness enthusiast.
